form.formComment: Last start 5th (FT Fr3) over 2230m at Globe Derby Park, beaten 22 m by Majestic Summer (2:55.40) in NR up to 46 on March 28 at $21. At the start before was well beaten after breaking at Globe Derby Park on March 24. Do not dismiss.

form.formComment: Last start 7th (Fr2) over 2070m after showing early pace at this track beaten 40 m by Cadence Lane (2:35.40) in NR up to 50 on March 4 at $151. Two runs back 5th (Fr4) over 2230m after showing early pace at Globe Derby Park was leading by 4.1m on the pegs at the bell, beaten 60 m by Star Of Patrick (2:49.90) in NR up to 43 on October 27 at $9. Expect to see a much better run.

form.formComment: Last start surrendered the lead and finished 6th (FT Fr1) over 2160m at Victor Harbor beaten 45 m by The Vicars Girl (2:45.50) in NR up to 59 on April 5 at $10.80. At the run before solid effort when 2nd (20m Fr1) over 2230m at Globe Derby Park, beaten 3 m by Nothing I Want (2:59.80) in 5 LIFETIME WINS on March 28 at $5.50. Capable of more than she has shown recently. Rates highly and can do much better.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into fourth behind Hayoak at Globe Derby Park over 2230m in a NR up to 51 on April 11 at $10. Performed better the start before with a game effort when 2nd (FT Fr2) over 2230m at Globe Derby Park, beaten 3 m by Majestic Summer (2:55.40) in NR up to 46 on March 28 at $1.75. Big chance on his best form.
